content:

Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★★

Overview: Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. and its subsidiaries produce and distribute components for computer, communication, and electronic equipment both in China and globally, with a market cap of CN¥384.48 billion.

Operations: Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing generates revenue through the production and sale of components for computer, communication, and electronic equipment across domestic and international markets.

Insider Ownership: 33.5%

Revenue Growth Forecast: 38.2% p.a.

Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing is experiencing robust growth, with first-quarter 2026 revenue reaching CNY 13.14 billion, up from CNY 8.60 billion a year prior, and net income rising to CNY 1.11 billion from CNY 455.86 million. Earnings are forecast to grow significantly at 69.31% annually over the next three years, outpacing the market's expected growth rate of 26.9%. Despite high debt levels and volatile share prices, insider ownership remains strong without recent substantial insider trading activity.
